title: FranceTiersTagger
description: a tier tagger for FranceTiers the french pvp tier list
body:
# FranceTiers Tagger
is a client side mod that show players tiers from FranceTiers (the french pvp tierlist) under there names (you can also do /francetiers to see every tiers from someone)
![example lol](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfd0486c772997eb9d3f7582a35f9b19a1a0a20b_0.webp)
